description: Style Noteshorts are the coolest bottoms to wear in the current season - and perhaps the most versatile too. Slip into this pair when on a long journey, a casual day at home or at the gym. Pair them with sports shoes or flip flops to suit the occasion.Product DetailsGrey shorts with two insert pockets on the sides, a wide elasticated waistband with drawstrings inside, brand rubber print and graphic print on the left legMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry or bleachFlat dry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
